name: Agency Group — Idealista Off-Market Scraper
description: Scrapes Idealista.pt for off-market leads matching Agency Group's target: price ≥500K, premium zones, types moradia/quinta/prédio/terreno/hotel

output_schema.description: Each item must be normalized before ingestion to /api/offmarket-leads

fields.source_listing_id: string — idealista property ID from URL
fields.nome: string — 'Proprietário Idealista [ID]' or extracted owner hint
fields.urgency: string — high if 'price drop' in listing | low by default

normalization_transform.description: Apply this JS transform in n8n Code node before POST to /api/offmarket-leads

schedule_description: Run daily at 06:00 before daily digest at 08:00
deduplication: source + source_listing_id UNIQUE index handles duplicates — API returns 409 on duplicate
